_comment: Portal WAR estimates for 2025-26 season. Positive = gained talent, Negative = lost talent.
_units: AdjEM equivalent points gained/lost from portal activity
_update: Update each preseason as portal window closes (May–August)

_nil_retention_notes.note: Programs with strong NIL retain draft-eligible stars. Track these signals pre-season.
examples: LSU strong NIL → retained key players
